rationale: Central N-scavenging: glnA (GS), cynABDS (cyanate transport+hydratase), ntcA (global N regulator), amt1 (ammonium transporter), ureA-D (urease) — all expected UP under N-limit
Full PSI reaction center (psaA-M, ycf3/4/37) — expected DOWN as photochemistry is throttled under N-limit
Full PSII complement (psbA-Z, ycf48) — expected DOWN; psbA D1 turnover reduces specifically under N-limit
RuBisCO (rbcL/rbcS/rbcR), carboxysome shell (csoS1-4), Calvin cycle (gap2/fbaA/fbp-sbp) — expected DOWN as C-fixation scales with N-assimilation capacity
Large + small subunit rpl/rps/rpm complement — expected DOWN per N-cost minimization (Read 2017)
Glutamate family (argB-J, glnA, proA-S) — expected UP; supplies Glu/Gln backbone for N-scavenging
Core N-assimilation: glnA (GS), cynABDS (cyanate), glsF (ferredoxin-glutamate synthase) — small but biologically direct
PSI/PSII (psa*/psb*), cytochrome b6f (petA-H), ATP synthase (atpA-I) — unified photosynthesis anchor, expected DOWN
Full rpl*/rpm*/rps* ribosomal protein set — expected DOWN per N-cost minimization
GS-GOGAT cycle (glnA), aspartate aminotransferases (aspC), argH/G arginine bridge, carA/B carbamoyl phosphate — expected UP (contains glnA, key to N-scavenging)
Gly/Ser/Thr pathway (glyA, serA, thrA-C, gcvH/P/T) — direction ambiguous: can be UP as AA biosynthesis ramps for N-scavenging, or DOWN as general protein biosynthesis is suppressed
